$comment: Vercel deployment security config. CSP is scoped to exactly what this site loads. It boots via a client-side Design-Component runtime (support.js) that (a) evaluates the logic class with new Function and (b) loads React/ReactDOM (and Babel for any JSX imports) from unpkg with SRI. That forces script-src to keep 'unsafe-eval' and allow https://unpkg.com. Authored style="" attributes are applied by React via CSSOM (element.style.*), which is NOT governed by CSP, so they need nothing; however the runtime injects a few <style> elements via textContent (keyframes/resets/atomics), which DOES require style-src 'unsafe-inline'. script-src 'unsafe-inline' is NOT needed and has been removed (no inline <script> executes; the logic block is type=text/x-dc). To drop the remaining exceptions, precompile to a static bundle (see report).

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' https://unpkg.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://unpkg.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' mailto:; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
